title: Dissection and Immunohistochemistry of Mouse Vagal Ganglia
author: Thomas Taylor-Clark
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.w6cfhaw

steps.title: 6 to 8 weeks old mice...
steps.instruction: 6 to 8 weeks old mice (male) were euthanized by CO 2 inhalation

steps.title: Mice were transcardially perfused with phosphate...
steps.instruction: Mice were transcardially perfused with phosphate buffered saline (PBS) to remove blood followed by 3.7% formaldehyde (PFA) in PBS

steps.title: Vagal ganglia (including both jugular and...
steps.instruction: Vagal ganglia (including both jugular and nodose ganglia) were collected and fixed with 3.7% PFA for 2 hours on ice

steps.title: Vagal ganglia were transferred to 18%...
steps.instruction: Vagal ganglia were transferred to 18% sucrose solution for overnight at 4 °C

steps.title: Tissue were mounted in optimal cutting temperature compound and frozen
steps.instruction: Tissue were mounted in optimal cutting temperature compound and frozen

steps.title: Tissue were cut at 20 µm...
steps.instruction: Tissue were cut at 20 µm thickness and collected onto superfrost plus microscopy slide glass

steps.title: Tissue were washed with PBS three times for 10 min
steps.instruction: Tissue were washed with PBS three times for 10 min

steps.title: Tissue were blocked with blocking buffer...
steps.instruction: Tissue were blocked with blocking buffer (1% bovine serum albumin/10% normal donkey serum/0.3% triton x-100 in PBS) for 45 min at room temperature

steps.title: Tissue were incubated with primary antibody...
steps.instruction: Tissue were incubated with primary antibody (1:150, goat anti-VR1, SC-12498, Santa Cruz) diluted in blocking buffer overnight at 4 °C

steps.title: Tissue were washed with 0
steps.instruction: Tissue were washed with 0.2% tween20 in PBS (PBST) for 10 min for three times at room temperature

steps.title: Secondary antibody (1:300, Alexa flour 647...
steps.instruction: Secondary antibody (1:300, Alexa flour 647 Chicken anti-goat, A21469, Invitrogen) was diluted in the 1% bovine serum albumin/5% normal donkey serum/0.2% PBST and tissue were incubated with it for 1 hour at room temperature

steps.title: Tissue were washed with 0
steps.instruction: Tissue were washed with 0.2% tween20 in PBS (PBST) for 10 min for three times at room temperature

steps.title: Tissue were cover-slipped with DPX for...
steps.instruction: Tissue were cover-slipped with DPX for imaging and left to dry in the dark overnight.
